segments.text:
I am inquired of by those who didn’t ask. I am found by those who didn’t seek me. 
I said, ‘See me, see me,’ to a nation that was not called by my name.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
I have spread out my hands all day to a rebellious people, who walk in a way that is not good, 
after their own thoughts;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
a people who provoke me to my face continually, sacrificing in gardens, 
and burning incense on bricks;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: who sit among the graves, and spend nights in secret places; who eat pig’s meat, and broth of abominable things is in their vessels;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
who say, ‘Stay by yourself, don’t come near to me, 
for I am holier than you.’These are smoke in my nose, a fire that burns all day.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
“Behold, it is written before me: I will not keep silence, 
but will repay, 
yes, I will repay into their bosom
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: your own iniquities and the iniquities of your fathers together
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh,

who have burned incense on the mountains, 
and blasphemed me on the hills. 
Therefore I will first measure their work into their bosom.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Yahweh says,
As the new wine is found in the cluster, and one says, ‘Don’t destroy it, for a blessing is in it:’so I will do for my servants’ sake, that I may not destroy them all.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I will bring offspring out of Jacob, and out of Judah an inheritor of my mountains. My chosen will inherit it, and my servants will dwell there.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Sharon will be a fold of flocks, and the valley of Achor a place for herds to lie down in, 
for my people who have sought me.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
God

segments.text: I will destine you to the sword, and you will all bow down to the slaughter; because when I called, you didn’t answer. When I spoke, you didn’t listen; but you did that which was evil in my eyes, and chose that in which I didn’t delight.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Therefore the Lord Yahweh says,
Behold, my servants will eat, but you will be hungry; behold, my servants will drink, but you will be thirsty. Behold, my servants will rejoice, but you will be disappointed.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
Behold, my servants will sing for joy of heart, but you will cry for sorrow of heart, 
and will wail for anguish of spirit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will leave your name for a curse to my chosen, and the Lord Yahweh will kill you. He will call his servants by another name,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text:
so that he who blesses himself in the earth will bless himself in the God of truth; 
and he who swears in the earth will swear by the God of truth; because the former troubles are forgotten, and because they are hidden from my eyes.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
“For, behold, I create new heavens and a new earth; and the former things will not be remembered, 
nor come into mind.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
But be glad and rejoice forever in that which I create; for, behold, I create Jerusalem to be a delight, 
and her people a joy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will rejoice in Jerusalem, and delight in my people; and the voice of weeping and the voice of cryingwill be heard in her no more.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: “No more will there be an infant who only lives a few days, nor an old man who has not filled his days; for the child will die one hundred years old, and the sinner being one hundred years old will be accursed.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They will build houses and inhabit them. They will plant vineyards and eat their fruit.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They will not build and another inhabit. They will not plant and another eat; for the days of my people will be like the days of a tree, and my chosen will long enjoy the work of their hands.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They will not labor in vainnor give birth for calamity; for they are the offspring of Yahweh’s blessed and their descendants with them.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: It will happen that before they call, I will answer; and while they are yet speaking, I will hear.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
The wolf and the lamb will feed together. The lion will eat straw like the ox. 
Dust will be the serpent’s food. They will not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh.
